penalties.description: The marked circle was not completely cut out - portions of the inner circle remain attached to the outer material at task completion.

reasoning: Major disagreement on task completion status. Claude identified incomplete circle cutting with material still attached, resulting in automatic zero score per rubric. GPT-4o reported successful completion with only line deviation penalties. Given the severity of incomplete_circle penalty (automatic zero) versus line_deviation (5 points), Claude's assessment takes precedence as it addresses the fundamental completion requirement.
